channel.title: Madison Events
channel.description: Your guide to everything happening in Madison, WI. Updated daily.

item.title: The Official 90s vs Y2K Bar Crawl - Madison
item.description: @ Red Rock Saloon | Saturday, July 18, 2026 4:00 PM - 11:59 PM | 90s or Y2K—who takes the crown? Join the ultimate decade showdown in Madison on July 18th!

item.title: Freedom’s Journey:A Juneteenth Conversation w/Opal Lee & Dr. Charles Taylor
item.description: @ Center for Black Excellence and Culture, Inc. | Wednesday, May 20, 2026 1:00 PM - 3:00 PM | An inspiring Juneteenth conversation with Opal Lee, the "Grandmother of Juneteenth," and historian Dr. CharlesTaylor. In-person & livestream

item.title: Uncork Me Wisconsin 2026
item.description: @ Breese Stevens Field | Saturday, May 9, 2026 Time TBA | Sampling of 100+ Wisconsin wines, meads, and ciders. May 9, Breese Stevens Field, Madison. 2:30PM (VIP) 3PM (Early Access) 4PM (GA) to 7PM.

item.title: Nurse Appreciation Night at Drumlin Ridge Winery
item.description: @ Drumlin Ridge Winery | Thursday, May 7, 2026 4:30 PM - 7:00 PM | A relaxed Nurse Appreciation Night at Drumlin Ridge Winery during Nurse Appreciation Week. Wine on us to say thank you.

item.title: 2026 Wisconsin Collaborative Clinical Research Professionals Conference
item.description: @ Madison Public Library - Central | Tuesday, April 14, 2026 9:00 AM - 4:30 PM | Voices of Clinical Research: The Participants, Researchers, and Partners who Move Medicine Forward.

item.title: Data Centers & a Sustainable Future
item.description: @ 821 E Washington Ave | Tuesday, April 14, 2026 8:00 AM - 10:00 AM | Join us for our April Sustainable Breakfast Series as we explore data centers.

item.description: @ Chazen Museum of Art | Sunday, April 5, 2026 12:30 PM - 2:00 PM | Join us in the Chazen Mead Witter Lobby for an incredible performance by Ancora String Quartet!

item.description: @ The Stuffed Olive - Madison | Tuesday, March 24, 2026 5:00 PM - 7:00 PM | Martinis on State! Join the Downtowners Social Club at The Stuffed Olive, State Street’s premier cocktail bar.

item.title: The Courage to Be Seen: Why Authenticity Cuts Through Social Media Noise
item.description: @ American Family Insurance - DreamBank | Wednesday, March 18, 2026 7:30 AM - 9:15 AM | Reclaim your voice, build real trust, and learn how showing up authentically cuts through the noise and creates meaningful connection.

item.title: Let's Play!

item.title: AARP Tax Preparation (FULL!)
item.description: @ Meadowridge Library | Monday, March 16, 2026 10:00 AM - 2:00 PM | Sign up for free assistance from AARP Foundation Tax-Aide volunteers to help fill out and file Federal and Wisconsin personal income taxes. Call 608-288-6160 no earlier than 9am on Wednesday,…

item.title: Baby Time

item.title: Bilingual Multi-Age Storytime

item.title: One-on-One Computer Assistance
item.description: @ Central Library | Monday, March 16, 2026 12:00 PM - 3:00 PM | Get help brushing up on essential computer skills, safely browsing the internet, creating and using an email address, filling out online applications, or even writing resumes and cover letters.…

item.title: Monday Meetup
